calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Precertification Class Action Lawsuit In Its Entirety
Off Calendar Aug-31-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KATY LEE's motion for dismissal of pre-certification class action lawsuit in its entirety without prejudice is granted on the condition that Plaintiff's counsel serve notice of the dismissal without prejudice of her PAGA claims on the LWDA.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
